Title: Creates certain age and other requirements for the New York naval militia and the New York guard
Summary: Establishes a maximum age of seventy-two for service and a maximum enlistment or commission age of fifty for the New York naval militia and the New York guard; creates uniform and training requirements for the New York guard.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the military law, in relation to creating certain age and other requirements for the New York naval militia and the New York guard
